title: Plukboerderij Grondig / Belgium
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A replication roadmap for Plukboerderij Grondig details the structure, governance, and business model of a Belgian Community Supported Agriculture initiative. It highlights the use of digital tools, member engagement, funding mechanisms, and good practices for fair and sustainable food supply chains.
